aboutMe.intro: Efficient code meets structured thinking. As a full-stack developer with a background in project management and design, I build software that performs under the hood – and convinces at the surface through clarity.
aboutMe.location: Location & Flexibility: Based in Woltersdorf near Berlin – easily available for hybrid models in the region or fully remote roles.
aboutMe.new_skills: Structured in the Sprint: My background in project management is my biggest advantage in programming. I know exactly what needs to come first, can estimate deadlines realistically, and guarantee highly efficient collaboration with design and product teams.
aboutMe.problem_solving: The Art of Problem-Solving: I love efficient processes, but also deliberately think outside the box when standard paths are blocked. For me, programming means finding the perfect balance: developing solutions that may be unconventional, but that nail the core idea without lazy compromises.

skillSet.headline: Expertise
skillSet.skills_text: My active toolkit for modern full-stack applications. My focus is on a deep understanding of logical connections, clean data flows, and structured software architecture. This allows me to quickly navigate existing codebases and use documentation efficiently. This systems understanding also extends to infrastructure: since I develop entirely on Linux (Pop!_OS) in my personal time, confident use of the terminal comes naturally to me.
skillSet.skill_contact_me: That's exactly what drives me. Technology constantly evolves – if your stack uses different tools, I see that as a welcome challenge. Thanks to my broad foundation, I have no hesitation with new frameworks and bring the methodical understanding to quickly grasp new stacks and put them to productive use.

projects.explore: Take a look around. This is the best way to get a feeling for how I build things.
projects.join_explain: A task manager based on the Kanban principle. Create and organize tasks via drag & drop – and assign users and categories.
projects.sharkie_explain: A 2D game about the little shark called Sharkie. You guide him through the underwater world and defeat his enemies. This project shows object-oriented programming in action – from character behavior to game mechanics.
projects.third_project: Placeholder for whatever gets added here later

contact.problem_solve: Is there a problem to solve?
contact.why_me: I welcome any inquiry – primarily to join your development team on a permanent basis, but also for targeted, demanding project support. My focus is on building software thoughtfully from the ground up, so it runs stable and productive from day one.
contact.project_aim: "It works, it delivers value, it can scale"
contact.write_me: If you are looking for a full-stack developer who thinks ahead, reliably solves technical problems, and takes ownership of the end product: let's talk!
